ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "service_interval" INTEGER /* Recommended service interval in miles or kilometers */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the reading belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "boost" REAL /* Boost pressure */,
  "coolant_temp" INTEGER /* Coolant temperature */,
  "exh_diff" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure difference */,
  "exh_l" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure (left) */,
  "exh_r" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure (right) */,
  "fuel_press" REAL /* Fuel pressure */,
  "fuel_rate" REAL /* Fuel rate */,
  "load" INTEGER /* Engine load */,
  "oil_press" REAL /* Oil pressure */,
  "rpm" REAL /* Engine RPM */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the reading was taken */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of the reading */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Battery voltage at the time of the reading */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the model */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standards the model meets */,
  "engine_capacity" REAL /* Engine capacity */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Category of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value */,
  "critical_threshold" REAL /* Critical threshold for alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical reading */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "boost" REAL /* Boost pressure */,
  "coolant_temp" INTEGER /* Coolant temperature */,
  "exh_diff" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure difference */,
  "exh_l" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure (left) */,
  "exh_r" INTEGER /* Exhaust pressure (right) */,
  "fuel_press" REAL /* Fuel pressure */,
  "fuel_rate" REAL /* Fuel rate */,
  "load" INTEGER /* Engine load */,
  "oil_press" REAL /* Oil pressure */,
  "rpm" REAL /* Engine RPM */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the reading was taken */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of the reading */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Battery voltage at the time of the reading */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_history_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES sensor_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, service technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic code */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the diagnostic code */,
  "code_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic code */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the code (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action to resolve the issue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the diagnostic code (e.g., engine, transmission) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence of the diagnostic code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_diagnostics" (
  "diagnostic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the diagnostic belongs to */,
  "code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic code */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the diagnostic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the diagnostic (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the diagnostic issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnostic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_diagnostics_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_codes ("code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_diagnostics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
